title: samolus ebracteatus var. cuneatus
intro: Samolus ebracteatus var. cuneatus, also known as Alpine Samphire, is a plant species of the Primulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and expectorant effects, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is also said to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its rich content of antioxidants and flavonoids. Alpine Samphire can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
